narrative:
Newbury Twp township has 4,033 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.5 percentage points.
